name: plexamp
title: Plexamp
description: Browse Plex music libraries and control Plexamp playback from Raycast.
author: kendaniels

commands.name: browse-media
commands.title: Browse Library
commands.subtitle: Plexamp
commands.description: Browse Plex music libraries and queue tracks in Plexamp.

commands.name: player-controls
commands.title: Now Playing
commands.subtitle: Plexamp
commands.description: Play, pause, skip, and inspect the current Plexamp queue.

commands.name: now-playing-menubar
commands.title: Now Playing Menubar
commands.subtitle: Plexamp
commands.description: Show the current Plexamp track in the menu bar.

commands.name: plexamp-status
commands.title: Plexamp Status
commands.subtitle: Plexamp
commands.description: Inspect Plexamp client details and the connected Plex music library.

commands.name: disconnect-from-plex
commands.title: Disconnect from Plex
commands.subtitle: Plexamp
commands.description: Remove the saved Plex sign-in, server, and library selection.

commands.name: change-plex-library
commands.title: Choose Plex Library
commands.subtitle: Plexamp
commands.description: Choose a Plex music library from the available servers.

commands.name: search-tracks
commands.title: Search Library
commands.subtitle: Plexamp
commands.description: Search songs, albums, and artists in the selected Plex music library.

preferences.name: plexampUrl
preferences.title: Plexamp URL Override
preferences.description: Optional. Override the Plexamp player endpoint used for playback control.

preferences.name: trackRatings
preferences.title: Track Ratings
preferences.description: How track ratings should be displayed in Raycast.

preferences.name: menuBarFormat
preferences.title: Menubar Format
preferences.description: Customize the menu bar text with {track}, {album}, and {artist}.
